{
  "title": "Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here's Your 60-Second Fix",
  "meta_description": "Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and send a demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99. No signup needed.",
  "content_outline": [
    "Why Landlords Illegally Withhold Security Deposits",
    "What Your Landlord Can (and Cannot) Deduct",
    "How to Write a Security Deposit Dispute Letter That Works",
    "The 60-Second Solution: Send Your Demand Letter Today"
  ],
  "key_points": [
    "Most states require landlords to return deposits within 14-30 days; missing this deadline often makes them liable for penalties",
    "Normal wear and tear—such as scuffed floors, faded paint, and nail holes—is not a valid deduction from your security deposit",
    "A formal letter of demand is the fastest, most effective first step to recover your money before filing in small claims court"
  ],
  "cta": "Don't let your landlord keep what's yours. Generate your deposit return letter of demand in 60 seconds for only $19.99—no subscription, no signup, just results.",

      "keyword_target": "my landlord won't give me my deposit back",
      "angle": "Story-driven transformation"

    {
      "platform": "TikTok / Reels / Shorts",

      "keyword_target": "what to do when landlord doesn't return deposit",
      "angle": "Speed and affordability"

      "hook_text": "Can a landlord keep your security deposit for normal wear and tear? Absolutely NOT. Save this ⚠️",
      "keyword_target": "can landlord keep security deposit",

    {

      "hook_text": "If your landlord is ghosting you about your deposit, they’re breaking the law. Here’s the fix 👇",
      "keyword_target": "landlord not returning deposit",
      "angle": "Ghosting / non-response"
    },
    {
      "platform": "TikTok / Reels / Shorts",
      "hook_text": "You don’t need to sue your landlord. You need a security deposit dispute letter that actually sounds scary 📄😤",
      "keyword_target": "security deposit dispute letter",

  "short_form_scripts": [
    {
      "title": "The Deadline",
      "duration_sec": 25,
      "hook": "If your security deposit isn’t back in 30 days, they’re breaking the law.",

At Deposits-Back.com, you answer a few questions, and we generate your letter in 60 seconds. Just $19.99. No signup. No subscription.",
      "cta": "Link in bio. Get your money back today.",

      "title": "The Lie",
